abilities.description: Your hound is your steadfast companion. When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.ff32c523829d6481]{Endure Stress} in the company of their loyal presence, or if you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.c2c2f31f564caa06]{Hearten} with them by your side, roll +their health.

When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.ae5994ceb3cba098]{Strike} or @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.723192c97fec4fe2]{Clash} alongside your ferocious hound and score a hit, mark progress. On a strong hit with a match, your hound stands resolute by your side; take +momentum equal to their health.

When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.a2d7793b23c17489]{Secure an Advantage} or @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.3f5a834fa3fea5d1]{Gain Ground} using your hound's keen senses to track your quarry or investigate a scene, roll +their health and take +1 momentum on a hit.
